title: LED water spray pad
abstract: An LED water spray pad is provided, which includes a pad body provided with one or more water flow channels, the pad body is provided with one or more water spray holes that are penetrated through, and each water spray hole is communicated to the water flow channels; one or more light strips, provided on the pad body and configured to emit various colors of light; one or more water inlet members that are connected to the pad body to allow water to enter the water flow channels through the water inlet members. This application has the effect of increasing the attractiveness of the water spray pad.
claims: 1. An LED water spray pad, comprising: a pad body, the pad body is provided with one or more water flow channels, the pad body is further provided with one or more water spray holes that are penetrated through, and each water spray bole is communicated to the one or more water flow channels; one or more light strips, which are provided on the pad body and configured to emit various colors of light; one or more water inlet members, which are connected to the pad body to allow water to enter the one or more water flow channels through the one or more water inlet members; wherein the one or more light strips are provided in the one or more water flow channels; wherein one or more fixing blocks are fixedly provided on an inner wall of the one or more water flow channels, and each of the one or more fixing blocks is provided with a fixing hole that is penetrated through; when the one or more light strips are provided in the one or more water flow channels, the one or more light strips pass through each fixing hole to fix the one or more light strips to the inner wall of the one or more water flow channels.
